Start a Project
Services

What I offer

Simple pricing, premium quality. Everything you need to win online — from build to growth.

Services & Pricing

Everything you need to win online

One-Time

Website Build

$500 – $800

Single-page site starting at $500. Multi-page site starting at $800. Built fast, built to convert.

  • Custom design from premium template
  • Mobile-responsive & accessible
  • SEO-optimized from day one
  • Booking/contact form integration
  • Google Maps & Business setup
  • Custom domain & SSL
  • 2 rounds of revisions included
Get Started
Monthly

Hosting & Care

$50/mo

Reliable hosting, uptime monitoring, and ongoing support to keep your site running smoothly.

  • Hosting & uptime monitoring
  • Monthly content updates
  • Google Business optimization
  • Monthly analytics report
  • Speed & security monitoring
  • Priority email support
  • Minor design tweaks included
Get Started
One-Time

E-Commerce Build

$1,500 – $3,000

Full online store built on Shopify or custom stack. Priced by scope and complexity.

  • Shopify or custom build
  • Product catalog & collections
  • Secure checkout & payments
  • Mobile-optimized storefront
  • Inventory & order management
  • SEO & speed optimized
  • 2 rounds of revisions included
Get Started
How It Works

From zero to live in 2 weeks

01

Discovery Call

15-minute call to understand your business, goals, and what's not working with your current site. I'll show you what's possible.

02

Design & Build

I pick the perfect template from my library, customize it to your brand, load your content, and wire up booking/contact forms.

03

Review & Launch

You review the site, I make revisions until you're thrilled, then launch it on blazing-fast hosting with SSL and a custom domain.

04

Grow & Optimize

Monthly maintenance, Google Business optimization, analytics reporting, and ongoing tweaks to keep you ranking and booking.

Let's Go

Ready to stop losing
customers to a bad website?

Book a free 15-minute call. I'll audit your current site, show you what you're missing, and give you a clear plan — whether you hire me or not.

Book Your Free Call
Free audit · No pressure · 15 minutes
